seoTitle: Surbiton vs Susan River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Surbiton vs Susan River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Surbiton and Susan River.
heading: Surbiton vs Susan River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Surbiton, Queensland and Susan River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Surbiton has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Susan River (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Surbiton or Susan River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Surbiton has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Susan River scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Surbiton scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Susan River scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Surbiton or Susan River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Surbiton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
